base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tunnel_warp_zone — a tile from 1980 pac man. Side-tunnel warp entrance — both left and right sides of maze at middle-row. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Side-tunnel warp entrance — both left and right sides of maze at middle-row; ghosts move at half-speed through tunnels (Blinky-Cruise-Elroy speed boost an exception)
